remember: Students will be able to recall and use the definition of complex numbers, their representation on the complex plane, and basic operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
Students will be able to identify and use the properties of complex conjugates and modulus of a complex number.
Students will be able to solve quadratic equations with real coefficients using the quadratic formula and the concept of complex numbers.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of complex numbers as an extension of real numbers, and how they can be represented in the form a + bi.
Students will be able to understand the concept of modulus and argument of a complex number, and how they are related to the polar form of a complex number.
Students will be able to understand the concept of complex conjugates and how they are used to rationalize expressions involving complex numbers.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of complex numbers to solve problems involving quadratic equations, such as finding the roots of a quadratic equation with real coefficients.
Students will be able to apply the concept of modulus and argument to solve problems involving the distance between two complex numbers and the angle between two complex numbers.
Students will be able to apply the concept of complex conjugates to rationalize expressions involving complex numbers and simplify complex expressions.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between complex numbers and their graphical representation on the complex plane.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between the modulus and argument of a complex number and its polar form.
Students will be able to analyze the properties of complex conjugates and how they are used to simplify complex expressions.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of complex numbers and their representation on the complex plane.
To learn the basic operations of complex numbers, such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
To understand the concept of modulus and argument of a complex number and their relationship to the polar form of a complex number.
To learn the properties of complex conjugates and how they are used to rationalize expressions involving complex numbers.
To solve quadratic equations with real coefficients using the quadratic formula and the concept of complex numbers.
board_exam_objectives: To solve quadratic equations with real coefficients, including those that have complex roots.
To find the roots of a quadratic equation using the quadratic formula and the concept of complex numbers.
To simplify complex expressions involving complex conjugates and modulus of a complex number.
